sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nisimin Jesuh a min, umin huihpi nun ciangin;
Thu upna tawm hangin, Jesuh bek umin muang

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nisimin Jesuh Topa, umin beel in muang inla;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kha Siangtho keima tungah, hong taang hi, ka sin sungah;
hong hilh leh puk zolo, Jesuh bek umin muang in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lam a nop leh la sa ta, khua hong mial le
Gimna thuak ciang thungen in, Jesuh bek umin muang in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: muang ning, leitung bei mateng suang ning.
Vantung khua tun mateng in, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
